tools.name: alphalabs_get_catalog
tools.description: Free: list AlphaLabs Intelligence products, prices, and auth model.

tools.name: alphalabs_calibration_report
tools.description: Live paper-trading pipeline calibration telemetry: stage funnel, gate failures, near-misses. Derived analytics only — no positions, orders, or account data exist on this surface.

tools.name: alphalabs_evaluate_signal
tools.description: Score YOUR trade idea through the live AlphaLabs deterministic engine: composite score, tier, per-component sub-signals, floors. Price/volume confirmation is not evaluated (no vendor market data). Returns an evaluation_id for alphalabs_explain_decision.

tools.name: alphalabs_outcome_report
tools.description: Recorded outcomes of the live pipeline's own decisions: hit rates, score-band tables, accepted-vs-rejected edge, gate near-miss regret. Aggregated engine telemetry — percent moves and counts only.

tools.name: alphalabs_feature_attribution
tools.description: Which engine inputs actually predict outcomes, measured on recorded live results: Spearman rankings, median-split deltas, dead inputs.

tools.name: alphalabs_explain_decision
tools.description: Glass-box breakdown of a prior evaluation by evaluation_id: every sub-signal, weight, floor, and the composite reasoning.
